political.s: FEC: $791K in executive political donations; partisan lean Democratic +54 across 29 executive donors.

labor.s: 24 federal penalties totaling $462.9M since 2000 (Violation Tracker). Supply-chain signals: KnowTheChain 38/100; CHRB 12.5/26; UK MS statement; AU MS statement.

charity.s: $195M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.32% of revenue) via International Business Machines Corp. JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #8 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. Drucker Institute Management Top 250 — ranked #6 (2024) on customer satisfaction, employee engagement, innovation, social responsibility, and financial strength. Fortune World's Most Admired Companies — ranked #33 (2024). Newsweek Most Trustworthy Companies in America — ranked #38 (2024).

environment.s: environmental violation: $13.8M in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

dei.s: HRC Corporate Equality Index: 100/100 — Equality 100 Leader (2025). Top-rated LGBTQ+ workplace policies, benefits, and culture. JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #8 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index member (2024) — transparent on female leadership, equal pay, inclusive culture. Stanford FMTI Dec2025 foundation-model transparency: 95/100 — top-tier disclosure across data, labor, compute, and downstream-use indicators. HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating.

privacy.s: CISA Known Exploited Vulns: 7 CVEs on record (0 in past 12mo, 2 used in ransomware); affected products include Data Risk Manager, Aspera Faspex.

wiki.parent: Berkshire Hathaway, The Vanguard Group, State Street Corporation
wiki.industry: software industry, computer industry, IT service management, information technology consulting, computer hardware industry
wiki.keyPeople: Charles Ranlett Flint, Thomas John Watson, Sr.
wiki.extract: International Business Machines Corporation, doing business as IBM, is an American multinational technology company headquartered in Armonk, New York, and present in over 175 countries. It is a publicly traded company and one of the 30 companies in the Dow Jones Industrial Average. IBM is the largest industrial research organization in the world, with 19 research facilities across a dozen countries; for 29 consecutive years, from 1993 to 2021, it held the record for most annual U.S. patents generated by a business.

health.s: 9 CPSC recalls on record; sample hazard: the monitor's circuit board can overheat and smoke.

productBreakdown.label: WebSphere Application Server and Server Hypervisor Edition

topCves.vulnerabilityName: IBM Aspera Faspex Code Execution Vulnerability
topCves.shortDescription: IBM Aspera Faspex could allow a remote attacker to execute code on the system, caused by a YAML deserialization flaw.

topCves.vulnerabilityName: IBM InfoSphere BigInsights Invalid Input Vulnerability
topCves.shortDescription: Certain APIs within BigInsights can take invalid input that might allow attackers unauthorized access to read, write, modify, or delete data.
topCves.requiredAction: The impacted product is end-of-life and should be disconnected if still in use.

topCves.product: WebSphere Application Server and Server Hypervisor Edition
topCves.vulnerabilityName: IBM WebSphere Application Server and Server Hypervisor Edition Code Injection.
topCves.shortDescription: Serialized-object interfaces in certain IBM analytics, business solutions, cognitive, IT infrastructure, and mobile and social products allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands

topCves.vulnerabilityName: IBM Data Risk Manager Directory Traversal Vulnerability
topCves.shortDescription: IBM Data Risk Manager contains a directory traversal vulnerability that could allow a remote authenticated attacker to traverse directories and send a specially crafted URL request to download arbitrary files from the system.

topCves.vulnerabilityName: IBM Data Risk Manager Security Bypass Vulnerability
topCves.shortDescription: IBM Data Risk Manager contains a security bypass vulnerability that could allow a remote attacker to bypass security restrictions when configured with SAML authentication. By sending a specially crafted HTTP request, an attacker could exploit this vulnerability to bypass the authentication process and gain full administrative access to the system.

topHazards.label: The monitor's circuit board can overheat and smoke, posing a fire hazard to consumers.
A plastic weld on the power adapters can fail and allow two parts to separate, exposing live electrical contacts. This poses a shock hazard to consumers.
These lithium-ion batteries can cause overheating, posing a fire hazard to consumers.

sampleRecalls.title: Power Adapters Used with IBM RDX Back Up Disk Hard Drives Recalled Due to Shock Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves power adapters sold with IBM RDX removable back up hard disk drives. The data storage devices were sold with a power adapter that fits various country specific plugs. "Hon-Kwang Electric (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd" is printed on the adapters. IBM and RDX are printed on the back up hard disk drives.
hazards: A plastic weld on the power adapters can fail and allow two parts to separate, exposing live electrical contacts. This poses a shock hazard to consumers.
products: Power Adapters with IBM RDX Back Up Hard Disk Drives

sampleRecalls.title: Lenovo and IBM Announce Recall of ThinkPad Notebook Computer Batteries Due to Fire Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: The recalled lithium-ion batteries were sold with or sold separately to be used with the following ThinkPad notebook computers: T Series (T43, T43p, T60, T60p); R Series (R51e, R52, R60, R60e); and X Series (X60, X60s). The recalled batteries have the following part or model numbers, which can be found on the battery …
hazards: These lithium-ion batteries can cause overheating, posing a fire hazard to consumers.
injuries: Lenovo has received one confirmed report of a battery overheating and causing a fire that damaged the notebook computer. The incident, which occurred within an airport terminal as the user was boardi…
products: Rechargeable lithium-ion batteries used in ThinkPad notebook computers
units: About 168,500 battery packs (an additional 357,500 battery packs were sold worldwide)

sampleRecalls.title: CPSC, IBM Announce Recall of AC Adapters for Notebook Computers
sampleRecalls.description: The recalled 56W AC power adapters were shipped primarily with IBM ThinkPad i Series, 390 and 240 Series, and s Series notebook computers. The adapters have three hollow pins at the AC inlet and part number 02K6549 on a label on the top of the unit. The IBM logo appears on top of the unit. Adapters with solid pins are…
hazards: The adapters can overheat, cause damage to the circuit board and melt through the housing, which poses a fire and electrical shock hazard to consumers.
injuries: IBM has received six reports of incidents, including some with minor property damage. No injuries have been reported.

sampleRecalls.title: CPSC, IBM and LiteOn Technology Announce Expansion of Previously Announced Recall of Computer Monitors
sampleRecalls.description: The recalled IBM monitors include the G51 CRT (Cathode Ray Tube) and G51t Touch Screen CRT models. The G51 and G51t monitors have the following model numbers on a label on the back of the unit: 6541-02N, 6541-02E, 6541-02S, 6541-Q0N, 6541-Q0E, and 6541-Q0S. The label on the back of the recalled G51 models also has a d…
hazards: The monitor's circuit board can overheat and smoke, posing a fire hazard to consumers.
injuries: IBM and LiteOn have received seven reports of monitors overheating and smoking, including one report of minor property damage and one report of minor smoke inhalation.
products: IBM monitors: G51 CRT (Cathode Ray Tube) and G51t Touch Screen CRT models

sampleRecalls.title: CPSC, IBM Announce Recall to Repair Computer Monitors
sampleRecalls.description: The recalled IBM monitors include the G51 CRT (Cathode Ray Tube) and G51t Touch Screen CRT models. The G51 and G51t monitors have the following model numbers on a label on the back of the unit: 6541-02N, 6541-02E, 6541-02S, 6541-Q0N, 6541-Q0E, and 6541-Q0S. The label on the back of the recalled G51 models also has a d…
hazards: The monitor's circuit board can overheat and smoke, posing a fire hazard to consumers.
injuries: IBM has received five reports of monitors overheating and smoking, including one report of minor property damage. No injuries have been reported.
products: IBM G51 CRT (Cathode Ray Tube) and G51t Touch Screen CRT Computer Monitors
